Audiovisual Processing

364 aliases · 180 functions

gif_to_mp4

function

Function gif_to_mp4.

audiovisual_processing.sh
View source 
    gif_to_mp4() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.gif}.mp4}"

        # Guard clauses
        if ! command -v ffmpeg &>/dev/null; then
            echo "ERROR: ffmpeg not found" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ -z "$input" ]]; then
            echo "Usage: gif_to_mp4 <input.gif> [output.mp4]" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ ! -f "$input" ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Input file '$input' not found" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ -f "$output" ]]; then
            echo "WARNING: Output '$output' already exists, overwriting..." >&2
        fi

        echo "Converting GIF '$input' -> MP4 '$output' ..."
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p "$output" && \
            echo "✅ Success: $output" || {
                echo "❌ Conversion failed" >&2
                return 1
            }

webm_to_mp4

function

Function webm_to_mp4.

audiovisual_processing.sh
View source 
    webm_to_mp4() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.webm}.mp4}"

        if ! command -v ffmpeg &>/dev/null; then
            echo "ERROR: ffmpeg not found" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ -z "$input" ]]; then
            echo "Usage: webm_to_mp4 <input.webm> [output.mp4]" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ ! -f "$input" ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Input file '$input' not found" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ -f "$output" ]]; then
            echo "WARNING: Output '$output' already exists, overwriting..." >&2
        fi

        echo "Converting WebM '$input' -> MP4 '$output' ..."
        ffmpeg -v warning -i "$input" \
            -vf "scale=trunc(iw/2)*2:trunc(ih/2)*2" \
            -c:v libx264 -crf 18 -c:a aac -b:a 192k "$output" && \
            echo "✅ Success: $output" || {
                echo "❌ Conversion failed" >&2
                return 1
            }

video_to_gif_chunks

function

Function video_to_gif_chunks.

audiovisual_processing.sh
View source 
    video_to_gif_chunks() {
        local input="$1"
        local chunk_duration="${2:-60}"      # seconds per chunk
        local fps="${3:-15}"
        local width="${4:-480}"
        local prefix="${5:-video}"

        if ! command -v ffmpeg &>/dev/null || ! command -v ffprobe &>/dev/null; then
            echo "ERROR: ffmpeg and ffprobe are required" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ -z "$input" ]]; then
            echo "Usage: video_to_gif_chunks <input.mp4> [chunk_duration=60] [fps=15] [width=480] [prefix=video]" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ ! -f "$input" ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Input file '$input' not found" >&2
            return 1
        fi
        if [[ ! "$chunk_duration" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] || [[ "$chunk_duration" -le 0 ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: chunk_duration must be a positive integer (seconds)" >&2
            return 1
        fi

        # Get total duration (integer seconds)
        local duration
        duration=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1 "$input" | cut -d. -f1)
        if [[ -z "$duration" ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Could not read duration from '$input'" >&2
            return 1
        fi

        echo "Splitting '$input' (duration ${duration}s) into ${chunk_duration}s GIF chunks..."
        local c=0
        local success_count=0
        for ((i=0; i<=duration; i+=chunk_duration)); do
            local index=$(printf "%02d" "$c")
            local output="${prefix}_${index}.gif"
            echo "Processing chunk $c: $output"
            ffmpeg -v error -ss "$i" -t "$chunk_duration" -i "$input" \
                -vf "fps=$fps,scale=$width:-1:flags=lanczos" -y "$output" && \
                ((success_count++))
            ((c++))
        done

        echo "✅ Done! $success_count GIF chunk(s) created."
        if [[ $success_count -eq 0 ]]; then
            echo "WARNING: No chunks were generated" >&2
            return 1
        fi
    }

concat_m4s

function

Function concat_m4s.

audiovisual_processing.sh
View source 
    concat_m4s() {
        if [ $# -lt 2 ]; then
            echo "Usage: ffmpeg_concat_m4s <output_file> <input_part1> [input_part2] ..."
            echo "Example: ffmpeg_concat_m4s output.mp4 part0.m4s part1.m4s part2.m4s"
            return 1
        fi
        local output_file="$1"
        shift
        local concat_list=$(mktemp)
        for input_file in "$@"; do
            if [ ! -f "$input_file" ]; then
                echo "Error: File not found - $input_file"
                rm -f "$concat_list"
                return 1
            fi
            echo "file '$input_file'" >> "$concat_list"
        done
        ffmpeg -f concat -safe 0 -i "$concat_list" -c copy "$output_file"
        if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "Successfully created: $output_file"
        else
            echo "Error: ffmpeg concatenation failed"
        fi
        rm -f "$concat_list"
    }

mp3_to_oga

function

Function mp3_to_oga.

audiovisual_processing.sh
View source 
    mp3_to_oga() {
      if ! command -v ffmpeg &>/dev/null; then
        echo "ERROR: ffmpeg not found" >&2
        return 1
      fi
      if [[ $# -eq 0 ]]; then
        echo "Usage: mp3_to_oga <file1.mp3> [file2.mp3 ...]" >&2
        return 1
      fi
        local quality="${FFMPEG_OGA_QUALITY:-3}"
        local codec="libvorbis"

        for input in "$@"; do
            local basename="${input%.mp3}"
            basename="${basename%.MP3}"
            local mp3_file="${basename}.mp3"
            local oga_file="${basename}.oga"

            [[ ! -f "$mp3_file" ]] && { echo "Missing: $mp3_file" >&2; continue; }
            [[ -z "$FORCE" && -f "$oga_file" ]] && { echo "Exists: $oga_file (FORCE=1 to overwrite)" >&2; continue; }

            ffmpeg -i "$mp3_file" \
                  -c:a "$codec" \
                  -q:a "$quality" \
                  -map_metadata 0 \
                  -loglevel error \
                  -nostdin \
                  ${FORCE:+-y} \
                  "$oga_file" </dev/null
        done
    }

mp4_to_gif

function

Function mp4_to_gif.

audiovisual_processing.sh
View source 
    mp4_to_gif() {
        command -v ffmpeg  >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "ERROR: ffmpeg is required but not found." >&2; return 1; }
        command -v ffprobe >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "ERROR: ffprobe is required but not found." >&2; return 1; }

        local input="" output="" target_width="" target_height="" target_fps="" dither="bayer:bayer_scale=5"
        local usage="Usage: mp4-to-gif <input.mp4> [-o output.gif] [-w WIDTH] [-h HEIGHT] [-f FPS]"

        [[ $# -eq 0 ]] && { echo "$usage" >&2; return 1; }

        while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
            case "$1" in
                -o) output="$2"; shift 2 ;;
                -w) target_width="$2"; shift 2 ;;
                -h) target_height="$2"; shift 2 ;;
                -f) target_fps="$2"; shift 2 ;;
                -*) echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; echo "$usage" >&2; return 1 ;;
                *)  input="$1"; shift ;;
            esac
        done

        [[ -z "$input"   ]] && { echo "ERROR: no input file provided." >&2; return 1; }
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && { echo "ERROR: file '$input' not found." >&2; return 1; }

        local ext="${input##*.}"
        [[ "$ext" =~ ^(mp4|mov|mkv|avi|webm)$ ]] || { echo "ERROR: '$input' is not a recognised video file (.mp4/.mov/.mkv/.avi/.webm)." >&2; return 1; }

        local has_video
        has_video=$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=codec_type -of csv=p=0 "$input" 2>/dev/null)
        [[ "$has_video" == "video" ]] || { echo "ERROR: '$input' has no video stream." >&2; return 1; }

        local orig_width orig_height orig_fps
        IFS=',' read -r orig_width orig_height orig_fps < <(
            ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 \
                -show_entries stream=width,height,r_frame_rate \
                -of csv=p=0 "$input"
        )

        orig_fps=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.2f\", ${orig_fps:-30/1}}")

        : "${output:=${input%.*}.gif}"
        : "${target_fps:=$orig_fps}"

        if [[ -f "$output" && "$output" != "${input%.*}.gif" ]]; then
            echo "WARNING: '$output' already exists. Overwrite? [y/N] "
            read -r reply
            [[ "$reply" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; return 1; }
        fi

        local scale_filter
        if [[ -n "$target_height" ]]; then
            scale_filter="scale=-2:${target_height}:flags=lanczos"
        elif [[ -n "$target_width" ]]; then
            scale_filter="scale=${target_width}:-2:flags=lanczos"
        else
            scale_filter="scale=${orig_width}:${orig_height}:flags=lanczos"
        fi

        echo "→ ${input}  (${orig_width}x${orig_height} @ ${orig_fps} fps)  →  ${output}"
        echo "  scale: ${scale_filter}   fps: ${target_fps}   dither: ${dither}"

        ffmpeg -y -i "$input" \
            -filter_complex \
                "[0:v] fps=${target_fps},${scale_filter},split[a][b];\
                [a]palettegen=max_colors=256:stats_mode=diff[p];\
                [b][p]paletteuse=dither=${dither}" \
            -loop 0 "$output"

        local ret=$?
        if [[ $ret -eq 0 ]]; then
            local size
            size=$(du -h "$output" | cut -f1)
            echo "✔ Done: ${output} (${size})"
        fi
        return $ret
    }

webm_to_mp3

function

Function webm_to_mp3.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, defaults to input name with .mp3); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    webm_to_mp3() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mp3}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec libmp3lame -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec aac -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.wav}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec pcm_s16le "$output"

webm_to_flac

Function webm_to_flac.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional); $3 compression level 0-8 (optional, default 5)
View source 
    webm_to_flac() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.flac}"
        local compression="${3:-5}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec flac -compression_level "$compression" "$output"
    }

        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1

        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.m4a}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec alac "$output"
    }

Function avi_to_ogg.

audiovisual_processing.sh

    avi_to_ogg() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.ogg}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec libopus -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

function

Function mov_to_flac.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .flac); $3 compression level 0-8 (optional, default 5)
View source 
    mov_to_flac() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.flac}"
        local compression="${3:-5}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec flac -compression_level "$compression" "$output"
    }

webm_to_mpg

function

Function webm_to_mpg.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .mpg); $3 video CRF quality 18-28 (optional, default 23); $4 scale (optional, e.g., "1280:-1" or "640x480")
View source 
    webm_to_mpg() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mpg}"
        local crf="${3:-23}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v mpeg2video -crf "$crf" -c:a mp2 "$output"
    }

webm_to_ogg

function

Function webm_to_ogg.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .ogv); $3 video quality 0-10 (optional, default 7); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    webm_to_ogg() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.ogv}"
        local quality="${3:-7}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libtheora -q:v "$quality" -c:a libvorbis "$output"
    }

webm_to_avi

function

Function webm_to_avi.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .avi); $3 video CRF 18-28 (optional, default 23); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    webm_to_avi() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.avi}"
        local crf="${3:-23}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libx264 -crf "$crf" -c:a mp3 "$output"
    }

mpg_to_webm

function

Function mpg_to_webm.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .webm); $3 video CRF 0-63 (optional, default 30); $4 scale (optional, e.g., "1280:-1")
View source 
    mpg_to_webm() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.webm}"
        local crf="${3:-30}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libvpx-vp9 -crf "$crf" -b:v 0 -c:a libopus "$output"
    }

Function ogg_to_mov.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .mov); $3 video CRF 18-28 (optional, default 23); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    ogg_to_mov() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mov}"
        local crf="${3:-23}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libx264 -crf "$crf" -c:a aac "$output"
    }

function

Function ogg_to_flv.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .flv); $3 video CRF 18-28 (optional, default 23); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    ogg_to_flv() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.flv}"
        local crf="${3:-23}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libx264 -crf "$crf" -c:a aac "$output"
    }

avi_to_webm

function

Function avi_to_webm.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .webm); $3 video CRF 0-63 (optional, default 30); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    avi_to_webm() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.webm}"
        local crf="${3:-30}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libvpx-vp9 -crf "$crf" -b:v 0 -c:a libopus "$output"
    }

avi_to_mp4

function

Function avi_to_mp4.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .mp4); $3 video CRF 18-28 (optional, default 23); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    avi_to_mp4() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mp4}"
        local crf="${3:-23}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libx264 -crf "$crf" -c:a aac "$output"
    }

avi_to_mpg

function

Function avi_to_mpg.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .mpg); $3 video CRF 18-28 (optional, default 23); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    avi_to_mpg() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mpg}"
        local crf="${3:-23}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v mpeg2video -crf "$crf" -c:a mp2 "$output"
    }

avi_to_ogg

function

Function avi_to_ogg.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .ogv); $3 video quality 0-10 (optional, default 7); $4 scale (optional)
View source 
    avi_to_ogg() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.ogv}"
        local quality="${3:-7}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libtheora -q:v "$quality" -c:a libvorbis "$output"
    }

flv_to_mov

function

Function flv_to_mov.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .mov); $3 video CRF 18-28 (optional, default 23); $4 scale (optional, e.g., "1280:-1")
View source 
    flv_to_mov() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mov}"
        local crf="${3:-23}"
        local scale="${4:-}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        local vf=""
        [[ -n "$scale" ]] && vf="-vf scale=$scale"
        ffmpeg -i "$input" $vf -c:v libx264 -crf "$crf" -c:a aac "$output"
    }

mp3_to_aac

function

Function mp3_to_aac.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .aac); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    mp3_to_aac() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.aac}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec aac -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

mp3_to_wav

function

Function mp3_to_wav.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .wav); $3 ignored
View source 
    mp3_to_wav() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.wav}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec pcm_s16le "$output"
    }

mp3_to_aiff

function

Function mp3_to_aiff.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .aiff); $3 ignored
View source 
    mp3_to_aiff() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.aiff}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec pcm_s16be "$output"
    }

mp3_to_flac

function

Function mp3_to_flac.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .flac); $3 compression level 0-8 (optional, default 5)
View source 
    mp3_to_flac() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.flac}"
        local compression="${3:-5}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec flac -compression_level "$compression" "$output"
    }

        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec alac "$output"
    }

        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"

function

Function mp3_to_wma.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .wma); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    mp3_to_wma() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.wma}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec wmav2 -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

Function aac_to_mp3.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .mp3); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)

    aac_to_mp3() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mp3}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec libmp3lame -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .oga); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    wav_to_oga() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.oga}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec libvorbis -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

wav_to_wma

function

Function wav_to_wma.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .wma); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    wav_to_wma() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.wma}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec wmav2 -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

aiff_to_mp3

function

Function aiff_to_mp3.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .mp3); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    aiff_to_mp3() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.mp3}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec libmp3lame -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

aiff_to_aac

function

Function aiff_to_aac.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .aac); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    aiff_to_aac() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.aac}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec aac -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

aiff_to_wav

function

Function aiff_to_wav.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .wav); $3 ignored
View source 
    aiff_to_wav() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.wav}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec pcm_s16le "$output"
    }

aiff_to_flac

function

Function aiff_to_flac.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .flac); $3 compression level 0-8 (optional, default 5)
View source 
    aiff_to_flac() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.flac}"
        local compression="${3:-5}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec flac -compression_level "$compression" "$output"
    }

Function aiff_to_alac.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .m4a); $3 ignored

    aiff_to_alac() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.m4a}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec alac "$output"
    }

    aiff_to_ogg() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.ogg}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec libopus -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

Function wma_to_oga.

audiovisual_processing.sh
Params: $1 input file; $2 output file (optional, default .oga); $3 audio bitrate (optional, default 192k)
View source 
    wma_to_oga() {
        local input="$1"
        local output="${2:-${input%.*}.oga}"
        local bitrate="${3:-192k}"
        [[ ! -f "$input" ]] && echo "Error: File not found" && return 1
        ffmpeg -i "$input" -vn -acodec libvorbis -b:a "$bitrate" "$output"
    }

ffmpeg-flv-to-mp3

alias→ flv_to_mp3

Function flv_to_mp3.

audiovisual_processing.sh
